translation: Indeed, over you are appointed guardians

transliteration: Wa huwa ma'akum ayna ma kuntum
translation: And He is with you wherever you are
Indeed Allah is ever, over you, an Observer

arabic: وَمَن يَتَّقِ اللَّهَ يَجْعَل لَّهُ مَخْرَجًا
transliteration: Wa man yattaqillaha yaj'al lahu makhrajaa
translation: And whoever fears Allah, He will make for him a way out
Indeed, Allah loves those who are constantly repentant
